pr_text:
## Title: Fix uninitialized memory reads in user API notification handlers

### Summary
Fix three instances where incorrect pointer values were passed to `user_ind_notify()`, causing the notification handlers to read beyond the bounds of valid data and access uninitialized memory. The `user_api_emm_callback()` and `user_api_esm_callback()` functions were passing pointers to the entire `user_ind_t` structure instead of pointers to the specific union members (`reg`, `loc`, or `pdn`) expected by th
